patterns_recognized: D-grade dual-signal-against heuristic degraded to 'weak negative signal' after going 0-for-4 on 5/25 (TB@BAL, CIN@NYM, ARI@SF, MIA@TOR all won despite dual signals against); do not assert directional reversal confidence — SKIP tier is already the correct stake response.

Stress flags (confidence_downgrade=True, bullpen_fatigue, F1* thin) are stake-size reducers without directional predictive value; 3 of 4 Claude DOWNGRADEs on stress-flag stacks were directionally wrong on 5/25 — do not DOWNGRADE solely on stress-flag stacking.

BvP OWNER entries without corroborating signals (negative edge, D-grade, or acute_roster) are insufficient for DOWNGRADE; standalone OWNERs (Tatis/Machado on 5/25 PHI@SD) failed entirely as Canning shutout SD 3-0.

HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap barely above 0 on PLATINUM, 5/25 WSH@CLE) allowed a 2-10 blowout loss despite pre-cap score=10/A; treat any PLATINUM pick with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap < +0.025 as effectively zero-stake regardless of tier demotion output.

WSH @ CLE.reasoning: CLE at 50.3% pick_prob is near-coin-flip; sole signal is F5_bullpen_gap=+0.74. Edge −6.46pp triggers HARD CAP 1 and HARD CAP 10 correctly zeros stake. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.014 (CLE's HL bullpen slightly worse) adds mild directional caution. Cavalli vs Cantillo: all BvP NO_DATA or SMALL_SAMPLE. Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.12). No qualitative basis to override caps on a marginal coin-flip pick with negative edge and minimal F-signal support.

TB @ BAL.reasoning: TB at 50.1% with sole F3_swing_take_gap=2955.4 and triple stress flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade). Edge −1.04pp triggers HARD CAP 1; HARD CAP 10 zeros stake. Per 5/25 postgame, stress flags are stake-size reducers only — 3/4 stress-flag DOWNGRADEs were directionally wrong. No BvP data available (empty arrays). Baz vs Jax matchup offers no qualitative differentiation. Caps are correct; no override warranted.

LAA @ DET.reasoning: DET at 52.9% with F1_xera_gap=1.53* (thin-sample) and F3=2085; PQI confirms (+14.3). Edge −2.68pp triggers HARD CAP 1; stress flags (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) add secondary suppression. HARD CAP 5 is satisfied (F3 as secondary signal alongside F1*). DET home batters vs Kochanowicz: all SMALL_SAMPLE BvP, no OWNERs or WEAK_VS flags. No qualitative basis to override caps on a below-55% pick.

CHC @ PIT.reasoning: Jordan Wicks has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date; the 100-pitch threshold for reliable SP quality estimation cannot be met. PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly applied per established precedent (validated 7+ times in 2026 archive). PIT home batters include Reynolds, Cruz, and Griffin, but without an SP quality anchor for the CHC side, grading is structurally impossible. No directional call is possible.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA: 0 Statcast pitches is a hard stop regardless of lineup signals

ATL @ BOS.reasoning: ATL at 50.5% with F2_xwoba_gap=0.024 and near-zero edge −0.07pp. HARD CAP 1 and HARD CAP 10 zero stake. ATL BvP vs Strider: Albies (OWNER, shrunk 0.869) and Riley (OWNER, shrunk 0.853) are OWNERs, but Acuña (25 PA, MEANINGFUL, shrunk 0.683) and Olson (32 PA, LOTS_OF_HISTORY, shrunk 0.692) both underperform vs Strider. Mixed BvP (2 OWNERs, 2 below-average) on a coin-flip pick does not override caps per 5/25 BvP lesson. BOS batters vs Suarez are all SMALL_SAMPLE.
lessons_applied: BvP OWNERs require corroborating signals to override caps

MIA @ TOR.reasoning: MIA at 54.3% but HARD CAP 7 fires (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0045; MIA's HL bullpen worse than TOR). HARD CAP 10 fires on bottom bucket. PQI against MIA (−6.5). Fair_prob=0.4206 — market prices TOR as meaningful favorite vs model's 54.3% for MIA. Alcantara vs Fisher: no BvP data. Market and both caps consistently flag this as a no-stake scenario; SKIP is correct.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 fires on positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap

CIN @ NYM.reasoning: CIN at 53.7% with F1_xera_gap=2.45 (Burns vs Peterson) but edge −0.52pp triggers HARD CAP 1; confidence_downgrade + bullpen_fatigue add suppression. HARD CAP 10 fires on bottom bucket. NYM home batters vs Burns: all NO_DATA BvP (Burns has essentially no MLB batter history). CIN batters vs Peterson: data empty. Burns' xERA edge is directionally promising but negative edge and coin-flip probability mean the caps are correct. No override basis.
lessons_applied: all-NO_DATA BvP removes lineup suppression signal

MIN @ CHW.reasoning: CHW D-grade (−2): Joe Ryan (MIN) holds 1.21 xERA advantage over Burke (CHW) and PQI against CHW (−16.5). D-grade dual-signal-against pattern historically flagged directional weakness, but 5/25 postgame: 0-for-4 on this pattern — now treated as 'weak negative signal' only, not directional reversal. Yesterday MIN@CHW: CHW won 3-1 despite similar signals. SKIP tier is already the lowest response; no further action. No BvP data to supplement.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against degraded to weak signal post-5/25
SKIP tier is already lowest stake response

NYY @ KC.reasoning: NYY at 62.6% with PQI confirming (+31.6, highest on slate) and F2_xwoba_gap=0.027. f5_full_delta=0.1735 (KC dominates F5 at ~80%) but NYY's HL bullpen is meaningfully better (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=−0.0175), validating the bullpen-carry full-game thesis. KC BvP vs Schlittler: all SMALL_SAMPLE, shrunk OPS 0.655–0.715 (collectively sub-average). Edge −5.06pp correctly zeros stake but PQI conviction and HL bullpen advantage both support NYY's directional read.

PQI +31.6 strongest directional signal on slate
negative edge correctly zeros stake despite conviction

STL @ MIL.reasoning: MIL at 64.2% with F1_xera_gap=3.89 (Harrison vs McGreevy) — one of the highest xERA gaps on the slate — and PQI confirming (+40.5). Edge −1.08pp triggers HARD CAP 1; market already prices MIL at fair_prob=0.6523 (above model). hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.005 (MIL HL pen marginally worse) doesn't trigger HARD CAP 7 (score=1 < threshold of 3). Similar profile to 5/25 STL@MIL: MIL won 5-1 with Misiorowski's 5.04 xERA gap. Harrison at 3.89 xERA continues the dominant-SP thesis.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 correct on negative-edge, market already priced MIL

HOU @ TEX.reasoning: HOU at 53.7% with edge +9.81pp but pick_prob=0.511 in (0.50, 0.52] band → HARD CAP 8 fires (bottom-bucket marginal favorite, edge ≤ +12pp). HARD CAP 10 fires. PQI confirms HOU (−21.6) but the probability band places this in the high-leak archetype. Yesterday HOU@TEX: TEX was the model pick (lost 9-0 to HOU). Today's reversal with HOU as pick in the same cap-sensitive band. Both caps correctly zero stake.

SEA @ OAK.reasoning: OAK at 63.0% full-game but f5_full_delta=0.2385 (SEA wins F5 at ~61%, massive Stage 1/2 disagreement) implies a bullpen-carry thesis for OAK. However, hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0045 (OAK's HL pen marginally worse than SEA's) directly contradicts the thesis. PQI against OAK (−8.0). Hancock vs Severino: no BvP data. The bullpen-carry thesis lacks the HL pen quality it requires. SKIP correctly captures the contradictory signals.
lessons_applied: bullpen-carry thesis contradicted by positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap
large f5_full_delta without supportive bullpen = no-stake

PHI @ SD.reasoning: SD D-grade (−3): Nola (PHI) holds 0.67 xERA advantage over Vásquez (SD) and PQI against SD (−6.3). Market prices near coin-flip (fair_prob=0.506) vs model's 59.2% for SD — market sharply discounting SD's modeled edge. Yesterday PHI shutout SD 3-0 (same series). Dual-signal opposition (Nola xERA + PQI against SD) on D-grade with market confirmation of near-coin-flip: SKIP is the correct structural response.
lessons_applied: market fair_prob=0.506 discounts model's SD edge

ARI @ SF.reasoning: ARI at 64.2% B-grade (score 2) with PQI confirming (−4.8) and edge +14.79pp in [4,15]pp band. Tier SKIP because score=2 doesn't meet GOLD bar. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=−0.0016 (ARI's HL pen marginally better, consistent with mild f5_full_delta=0.1619 bullpen-carry thesis). Eduardo Rodriguez vs Tyler Mahle: no BvP data. ARI won 6-2 at SF on 5/25 in the same series. This is the clearest directional conviction pick on the slate the model does not stake — CONFIRM with zero financial exposure.
lessons_applied: B-grade SKIP correct: score=2 below GOLD bar
ARI series win at SF on 5/25 corroborates direction

COL @ LAD.reasoning: LAD at 67.4% with F2_xwoba_gap=0.050 + F3=11324.1 (massive dual F-signal). Edge −4.09pp and Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.1496; LAD wins F5 at 82.4% but 67.4% full game) correctly produce score=0. PLATINUM scrutiny heuristic applied: score=0 means no stake regardless. Market prices LAD at fair_prob=0.7153, already well above model — HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents staking at inferior model odds. COL's late-game bullpen recovery thesis against LAD's F3=11324 lineup is not credible. LAD direction is sound; caps enforce zero exposure.
lessons_applied: PLATINUM scrutiny heuristic: treat with extra suspicion
market fair_prob=0.7153 confirms LAD dominance already priced
